scenario_name: auto halts before remote_mutate boundary regardless of --allow
ab_57_rationale: AB-57-1 risk_level NOT in permitted {read_only, local_mutate, repo_mutate}; remote_mutate requires per-invocation ACK per APPROVAL-BOUNDARY.md L21 (never cached). Even --allow=repo_mutate (highest permitted) does NOT bypass; HALT regardless of --allow.
